SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2017 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO MAR-01-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BRIAN COMPTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GUS MURAD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MURKELLEY, LLC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY GUS MURAD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-01-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF BRIAN COMPTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GUS MURAD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MURKELLY, LLC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY GUS MURAD, OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMPTON, BRIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MURAD, GUS (OWNER OF  MY BLDG) MURKELLEY, LLC. MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORP., PLAINTIFF'S LANDLORD, HOLDS THE MASTER LEASE TO A BUILDING OWNED BY DEFENDANTS AND PROVIDES HOUSING TO OTHERWISE HOMELESS VETERANS. DEFENDANTS EXERCISED ITS LEGAL RIGHT TO REGISTER THE BUILDING WITH THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS A HOTEL (SRO). IN DOING SO, DEFENDANTS DID NOT BREACH ANY DUTY OWED TO DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF BRIAN COMPTON RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMPTON, BRIAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY COMPTON, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT MURAD, GUS (OWNER OF  MY BLDG) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2016 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JAN-23-2017 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF BRIAN COMPTON & DEFENDANT GUS MURAD. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF SHALL AMEND HIS CLAIM TO INCLUDE AS DEFENDANTS MURKELLEY, INC. AND/OR MISSION HOUSING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPOTED. (D506).
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORP 1358 VALENCIA STREET SAN FRANCISCO CA. 94110
